text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Shake a leg! You're almost late for the start of
class! Tardiness is the route to delinquency! Be
careful!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Come on! You're way too worked up all the time!
That's why your skin is looking so rough!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wha?! My skin is... rough?! Th-that can't be...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
An unhealthy lifestyle is the route to delinquency!
Am I... going to become a delinquent?!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Then that makes me a star student! I follow a
proper skincare routine!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: No way?! So the bad student here... is me?!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: Erm, I dunno... But cheer up anyway! Don't fret it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O is shocked to realize she has
skin issues.
